seo.title: The Automation Sprint — one workflow in 3–6 weeks
seo.description: One production workflow in 3–6 weeks. Fixed scope and price, logic mapping first, partner approvals, hard monthly AI cap for professional service firms.

hero.headline: The Automation Sprint
hero.subheadline: One production workflow. Fixed scope. Fixed price. Built into your existing stack — not a rip-and-replace platform sale.

definition.oneLiner: We help small professional service firms reclaim hundreds of partner hours in 3–6 weeks — without rigid SaaS templates, surprise AI bills, or scope creep.
definition.scopeRule: Exactly one workflow per sprint. Additional workflows require a new sprint or change order.

process.title: Logic Mapping
process.description: We map how your firm actually operates — triggers, approvals, exceptions, and data sources — before any build.

process.title: Fixed-scope build
process.description: Senior engineers implement one production workflow into your stack with written AI spend limits.

process.title: Approval & go-live
process.description: Partner sign-off on every client-facing step. Team adoption support so the workflow runs Monday morning.

inclusions: One production workflow, documented and owned by your firm
Integration with existing email, CRM, drives, and spreadsheets
Hard monthly AI spend cap written into scope
Partner approval gates on client-facing automation
exclusions: Multiple workflows in a single sprint
Full SaaS replacement or greenfield platform builds
SOC 2 / HIPAA pipeline certifications we cannot credibly deliver
Generic AI wrappers we would not trust on real firm data
deliverables: Logic map of the automated workflow
Written scope, fixed price, and AI cost cap

promises.label: Economics
promises.value: Hard monthly AI cap in scope

promises.label: ROI window
promises.value: Measurable target within 90 days of go-live

promises.label: Risk gate
promises.value: Optional paid Blueprint before full build
